ItacAcademyItem.Name: Pitii (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Baytree with a swarm of bees either side
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications realted to the history of the Academy, but not in British Library catalogue, include: Pythiorum agonismata. Sive Academiae Litterariae institutio; ad culturam iuventutis, Apollini, musisque mancipatae; erecta a I.C. Andrea Taurello, .. (Bononiae, Benatij, 1628).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
